mapper.select: SELECT defective.defect_num, defective.defect_reason, defective.defect_action, defective.defect_qty, qc.qc_type, io.io_num, io.io_reason, io.io_date, item.item_num, item.name, item.unit, lot.lot_code, emp.ename FROM defective JOIN io ON defective.io_num = io.io_num JOIN emp ON io.emp_num = emp.emp_num JOIN lot ON io.lot_num = lot.lot_num JOIN item ON lot.item_num = item.item_num JOIN qc ON qc.qc_num = io.qc_num ORDER BY io.io_date DESC
SELECT qc_type FROM qc WHERE qc_type != 'BEING' GROUP BY qc_type

SELECT defective.defect_num, defective.defect_reason, defective.defect_action, defective.defect_qty, qc.qc_type, io.io_num, io.io_reason, io.io_qty, io.io_date, item.item_num, item.unit, item.name, lot.lot_code, emp.ename FROM defective JOIN io ON defective.io_num = io.io_num JOIN emp ON io.emp_num = emp.emp_num JOIN lot ON io.lot_num = lot.lot_num JOIN item ON lot.item_num = item.item_num JOIN qc ON qc.qc_num = io.qc_num
AND io.io_date >= TO_DATE(#{sDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND io.io_date < TO_DATE(#{eDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1
AND qc.qc_type = #{type}
AND ( upper(item.name) LIKE ('%' || upper(#{keyword}) || '%') OR upper(lot.lot_code) LIKE ('%' || upper(#{keyword}) || '%') )
ORDER BY io.io_date DESC
